commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Behold, the LORD will carry you away with a mighty captivity, and will surely seize you. Jerome's master assured him that the word which is usually rendered a warrior, has this meaning. (Haydock) The comparison agrees well with a proud man reduced to misery. (Calmet) Hebrew, "With the captivity of a man, and he will cover thee. "Septuagint, "he will cast out and bruise the man, and will take away thy comely robe, and throw thee into "(Haydock).
